objective: Refactor lib/core/models into responsibility subfolders with root compatibility facades: fractal, palette, export, exploration, wallpaper. Preserve existing package import paths and reduce model->service coupling by moving WallpaperTarget into the wallpaper model boundary while re-exporting it from WallpaperService for compatibility.
completedSlices: Moved fractal parameter/params/preset/view-state models to lib/core/models/fractal with root export facades.
Moved palette model to lib/core/models/palette with root export facade.
Moved image and video export option models to lib/core/models/export with root export facades.
Moved exploration stats model to lib/core/models/exploration with root export facade.
Moved wallpaper options to lib/core/models/wallpaper and introduced wallpaper_target.dart contract; wallpaper_service imports/re-exports the contract so existing service imports keep working.
